meta.title: Planning Water Supplies with CAPP — 2030 scenarios
meta.notes: Projected planning values, not historical actuals. Recycled (CAPP) is basin injection — not a fourth trunk supply. JSON groundwater_af is the UWMP Table 5 value. Dry tables (5-2/5-4) net Recycled out of GW (Supply≈Demand) → script restores GW_wells=GW+recycled. Normal (5-1) lists available supplies with surplus; GW 1200 is yield planning — script does NOT add recycled (avoids 5065 trunk). OceanOUT+OceanREUSE = hist mean outfall ~1300 AFY.

capp.meaning: CSD WWTP → AWPF → injection → basin (indirect potable reuse)

ocean_outfall.meaning: TOTAL CSD WWTP effluent (OceanOUT still-to-Pacific + OceanREUSE diverted-to-CAPP). Not district demand. Default total = historical mean ≈1300 AFY; reuse = min(recycled_af, total); out = total − reuse.
ocean_outfall.historical_mean_note: Mean of known 2014–2025 ocean_outfall_af in supply_historical.json, rounded to nearest 100 AF
ocean_outfall.uwmp_gsp_note: UWMP §5 tables do not vary outfall by scenario. GSP notes effluent formerly outfalled and CAPP redirects to injection / reduces ocean-boundary inflow — not a quantified outfall AF series.

example.label: LineupEqual
example.notes: Synthetic equal trunk lanes + CAPP 1000; ocean total = historical mean

scenarios.label: Normal water year
scenarios.notes: Normal Cachuma 75% planning (2110). JSON GW 1200 = Table 5-1 yield (availability); trunk GW stays 1200 → trunk≈4065. ocean_outfall_af is TOTAL (hist mean); split reuse 1000 / out 300.

scenarios.label: Single dry year
scenarios.notes: Single-dry SWP ≈5% Table A (110). JSON GW 628 = Table 5-2 residual; trunk GW_wells=1628. Ocean total unchanged (hist mean).

scenarios.label: Five-year drought (avg)
scenarios.notes: Five-year avg from 2014–2018 sequence (UWMP). JSON GW 1596 = Table 5-4 residual; trunk GW_wells=2596. Ocean total = hist mean.
